title: diaporeuomai #1279
definition:
1) to cause to pass through a place
 2) to carry across
 3) to journey through a place, go through
 4) to travel through
nasbUsage:

 2) to carry across
 3) to journey through a place, go through
 4) to travel through

    NASB:  to pass across, journey through:
